concept: Report / To Share Clarity for the Collective
description: The tempered act of sharing observed information for the benefit of the collective. It is not a cold, bureaucratic act, but a responsible contribution to shared understanding.
rationale: The collective 'we' establishes shared purpose - reports serve community, not individual glory. This communal foundation illuminates through 'so', bringing clarity where confusion dwelt, making the obscure visible to all. The flowing 'la' creates the path by which this clarity travels, ensuring knowledge reaches those who need it. Three acts of responsible sharing: gathering for all, clarifying truth, creating pathways - the sacred duty of bearing witness for the whole.
